error_message: LinkedIn returned 429 Too Many Requests after 45 profile views in session. Token bucket depleted.
retry_strategy: Exponential backoff: 30s then 90s. Rotated to backup LinkedIn session cookie after 2nd retry.
resolution_note: Resolved on 3rd attempt using backup session. Profile scraped successfully.

error_message: Apify actor returned 403 Forbidden. LinkedIn session cookie stale or expired.
retry_strategy: Refreshed session token from Airtable secrets store (key: linkedin_session_001). Re-queued lead with fresh cookie.
resolution_note: Cookie refreshed successfully. Profile scraped on 4th attempt (after refresh).

error_message: NewsAPI free tier limit (100 req/day) reached. Zero results returned for query 'Future Retail India'.
retry_strategy: Switched to Bing News Search API fallback (env.BING_NEWS_KEY). Re-queued company news sub-node.
resolution_note: Bing returned 3 relevant headlines from last 90 days. Cached result under key news_Future-Retail for 48hr.

error_message: GPT-4o response wrapped JSON output in markdown code fences (```json ... ```). JSON.parse() threw SyntaxError.
retry_strategy: Applied backtick-strip sanitizer (regex: /```json|```/g). Re-attempted parse on sanitized string.
resolution_note: Parse succeeded after sanitization. hook_confidence_score: 0.76. No data loss.

error_message: Airtable API POST to processed_leads table timed out after 10s. Processed URL not yet logged in dedup store.
retry_strategy: Retry with exponential backoff: waited 15s then retried. Second attempt succeeded within 3s.
resolution_note: URL logged to dedup store on retry. No duplicate risk as lead was not re-processed during the window.
